privileged_info_summary: The bundle_product_camping task is a synthetic Magento e-commerce task with fully verified metadata. The task requires creating a bundle product named 'Ultimate Camping Kit' (SKU: CAMP-BUNDLE-001) in the Sports category with shipment type 'Together' (value 0). The bundle contains exactly 3 options: (1) 'Choose Your Tent' (radio, required) with SKUs TENT-BASIC and TENT-FAMILY; (2) 'Select Sleeping Gear' (dropdown/select, required) with SKUs SLEEP-LITE and SLEEP-WINTER; (3) 'Add Camp Kitchen' (checkbox, optional) with SKUs COOK-STOVE and COOK-SET. All component products are created programmatically during task setup via the Magento REST API with synthetic names and pricing. The verifier checks 10 distinct criteria with a 60-point pass threshold out of 100 total points. All metadata claims are accurate and consistent with the task description and implementation scripts.
